steps.sql:
CREATE TABLE t1(a INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,b,c,d);
  INSERT INTO t1(a,b,c,d) VALUES
     (1,1,2,3),
     (2,2,3,4),
     (3,1,2,4),
     (4,2,3,5),
     (5,3,4,6),
     (6,4,5,9);
  SELECT a, CASE (b,c) WHEN (1,2) THEN 'aleph'
                       WHEN (2,3) THEN 'bet'
                       WHEN (3,4) THEN 'gimel'
                       ELSE '-' END,
         '|'
    FROM t1
   ORDER BY a;
